title: carex brevior
intro: Carex brevior, also known as the small-stemmed sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family, Cyperaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. It is said to have various health benefits, including relieving respiratory issues and reducing swelling. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
